hero.badge: Powered by Advanced AI Travel Intelligence
hero.subtitle: No complex forms — just type your destination, dates, and budget. We compare hundreds of airlines and hotels and show you the best price instantly.
hero.placeholder: e.g. Family trip to Istanbul in June, budget $1,500

suggestions.title: Try:
items: Cheapest flights to Bali this week

brandStory.title: How GoTripza Works
brandStory.body: Tell us about your trip in plain language — GoTripza reads your request, evaluates your budget, checks visa requirements and weather, then compares prices across hundreds of verified airlines and hotels. All in under 10 seconds. No fees — we only earn when you complete a booking.

mockups.title: Search to booking in three steps
mockups.subtitle: Type. Compare. Book.

confirm.title: Booking Confirmed ✓
confirm.wish: Have a great trip — GoTripza is always with you.

ai.title: Search in plain language
ai.desc: Type what you want — no forms, no dropdowns, no friction

smart.title: Prices in your currency
smart.desc: No conversions — what you see is what you pay

fast.title: 180+ airlines in one search
fast.desc: We reach the best price across all sources at once

support.title: Completely free to use
support.desc: No service fees — we only earn when you book

secure.title: All payment methods
secure.desc: Apple Pay, PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, Klarna

empathy.title: Best available price — guaranteed
empathy.desc: We show real prices from multiple sources — the cheapest is never hidden

simplicity.title: No hidden fees. Ever.
simplicity.desc: The price you see is the price at the partner site — no markup

inspiration.title: Options for every budget
inspiration.desc: Economy to luxury — you choose what fits

trust.title: Your privacy protected
trust.desc: We never store or share your personal data with any third party

speed.title: Results in under 10 seconds
speed.desc: From your first word to full price listings — zero waiting

testimonials.name: James Carter
testimonials.text: Saved £280 vs booking directly. The AI understood my trip perfectly — results in under 10 seconds.

testimonials.name: Sophie Martin
testimonials.text: Best travel search I've ever used. Compared hundreds of options in seconds and got a price I couldn't find anywhere else.

testimonials.name: Kenji Tanaka
testimonials.text: Used GoTripza to plan a trip to Bali — it handled dates, hotels, and flights perfectly. Genuinely impressive.

footer.affiliate: GoTripza earns a commission when you book through our partners — at no extra cost to you.

errors.parse: Couldn't understand that — try adding your destination, dates, and number of travelers.
errors.network: Connection lost — check your internet and try again.
